subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest the Kingdom of heaven! This world is even as the body of man, and the Kingdom of God is as the spirit of life.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب ملکوت الهی اینجهان مانند جسم انسانست و ملکوت الله مانند روح حیات
subcodes.subjects: @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transcending the material condition
